LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONERS RICHARD BREITBARTH, MARIA BREITBARTH, MOTION FOR POST SETTLEMENT AND CLOSURE OF THE ACCOUNT AND AFFIDAVIT OF PAYMENT OR DEPOSIT INTO REGISTRY. THE COURT ADOPTED AND AMENDED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION DENIED, WITHOUT PREJUDICE. INSUFFICIENT SHOWING THAT PLAINTIFFS ARE ENTITLED TO REQUESTED RELIEF. MOTION FOR INJUNCTION NOT CALENDARED. FURTHERMORE, PLAINTIFFS FAIL TO DEMONSTRATE A REASONABLE PROBABILITY OF SUCCESS ON THE MERITS. (PETITIONERS MOTION FOR INJUNCTION WAS NOT PROPERLY NOTICED AND DID NOT REACH THE COURT'S CALENDAR.) (COUNSEL TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
Ntc And Motion For Post Settlement And Closure Of The Account And Affidavit Of Payment Or Deposit Into Registry
Off Calendar May-28-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONERS RICHARD BREITBARTH, MARIA BREITBARTH, Motion for Post Settlement and Closure of the Account and Affidavit of Payment or Deposit into Registry. Appearances: Petitioner Richard Breitbarth appearing as Petitioner Pro Per and Moving party; Kristine Chen, Esq. ReedSmith LLP (415) 659-4819 appearing for Respondent and opposing party. The Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied, without prejudice. Insufficient showing that plaintiffs are entitled to requested relief. Motion for injunction not calendared. Furthermore, plaintiffs fail to demonstrate a reasonable probability of success on the merits. (Petitioners Motion for Injunction was not properly noticed and did not reach the Court's calendar.) (Counsel to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
